briefdescription.para: Size of SMAP width pattern.
Size of bootheader.
Mask for signed image in BH.
SHA3-384 hash length.
Word length in bytes.
Shift to convert word in bytes.
Size of Image Header Table in bytes.
Maximum number of partitions in the IHT.
Size of Image Header in bytes.
Size of Partition Header Table in bytes.
0th for Boot Header Hash
1st for PLM
2nd for PMC Data
3rd for Hash Block 1
0th for Meta Header
Secure client instance used for XilSecure IPI operations.
SHA3 digest output buffer aligned to 64 bytes and placed in .data.Sha3Hash section.

detaileddescription.para: The attributes ensure alignment and linker section placement for secure hash operations.

briefdescription.para: Buffer holding trailing hash bytes for chunked verification.
Hash Block authentication certificate parameters aligned to 64 bytes.
Boot Header Hash Block 0 storage aligned to 64 bytes and placed in .data.HashBlock0 section.
Authenticated hash block storage aligned to 64 bytes and placed in .data.HashBlock section.
This function computes SHA3-384 hash over the given data using xilsecure IPI.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the data to hash
Size of the data in bytes
Buffer (minimum 48 bytes, 64-byte aligned) to store hash

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function validates the Boot Header Hash Block certificate and authenticates it.

detaileddescription.para: The BH HB cert starts immediately after the Boot Header (at PdiAddr + SMAP_WD_PATTERN_SIZE + BH_SIZE). On success, MhOffset is set to the byte offset of the IHT.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
Base address of the PDI in memory
Output: byte offset from PdiAddr to the IHT

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function calculates hash and verifies hash of PLM & PMC CDO.

parameterdescription.para: Address where authenticated PDI is present
Address where boot header is present

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 PdiAddr, const u64 MhOffset, u32 PrtnStartIdx, const u32 PdiType)
memberdef.name: XLoader_ValidateMhAndPrtnAuth

briefdescription.para: This function validates the MetaHeader (IHT) Hash Block cert and authenticates all partitions starting from PrtnStartIdx.

para.verbatim: For each partition, a SHA3 hash of the partition data is computed and compared against the corresponding entry in the IHT Hash Block.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
Base address of the PDI in memory
Byte offset from PdiAddr to the IHT
Partition index to start from (1 for full PDI, 0 for partial PDI)
Type of PDI (full or partial) to determine hash block indexing

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u64 PdiAddr, const XilLoader_PrtnHdr *PrtnHdr, u64 PrtnIdx, const u32 PdiType)
memberdef.name: XLoader_VerifyPrtnAuth

briefdescription.para: This function calculates hash and verifies hash of each partition.

parameterdescription.para: Address where authenticated PDI is present
Pointer to partition header information
Partition index in the hash block
Type of PDI (full or partial) to determine hash block indexing

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function fills payload and sends IPI request for verifying signature for the provided hash.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
Address where hash block sign parameters are present
Address where hash block instance is present

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success
XST_FAILURE on failure

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to configure jtag status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
To enable / disable jtag.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XST_FAILURE on failure.
Perform input parameters validation. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XLoader_ConfigureJtagState CDO command Wait for IPI response from PLM with a timeout.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.
Perform input parameters validation. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XLoader_ConfigureJtagState CDO command Wait for IPI response from PLM with a timeout.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read DDR crypto performance counters.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
DDR device id.
To read DDR crypto counters.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XST_FAILURE on failure.
Perform input parameters validation. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XLoader_ReadDdrCryptoPerfCounters CDO command Wait for IPI response from PLM with a timeout.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.
Perform input parameters validation. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XLoader_ReadDdrCryptoPerfCounters CDO command Wait for IPI response from PLM with a timeout.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 PdiAddr, const u32 PdiType)
memberdef.name: XLoader_ValidatePdiAuth

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to validate authenticated PDI based on PDI type.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
Address where authenticated PDI is present
Value to indicate full or partial PDI

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

simplesect.para: This function has external linkage and is declared in xloader_plat_client.h for use by application code.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
- Address where authenticated PDI is present
- Value to indicate Full or Partial PDI

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

inbodydescription.para: For full PDI Partition 0 is PLM. Hence Idx starts from 1 for PLM loadable partitions
